items.title: JPMorgan (JPM) and MUFG Eye $22B Loan for Texas AI-Driven Data Hub
items.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Ken Fisher. On August 20, JPMorgan Chase and Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group entered talks to underwrite a $22 billion loan for a major data center project in Texas, led by Vantage Data Centers, backed by Silver Lake and DigitalBridge. […]
